channel.title: product management on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in product management on Frank Huang

item.title: Road to be a product manager
item.description: This is a new series that I make for recording my thoughts on different products. I think no matter products that are success or not, there exists some root logic inside it which I think is very interesting for reflection. So let me start recording this journey of thinking. Lately, I’ve been thinking about the product of Didi. Or more general, what is the profit that comes out of this bussiness pattern?
